title: CSPM + Cloud Resource Inventory — Multi-Cloud Posture Live Sync
description: cloud_connectors.py has abstract CloudProvider interface for AWS/Azure/GCP with unified resource/finding/posture APIs, rate limiting, and health monitoring. test_cspm_engine.py and test_cloud_resource_inventory_engine.py cluster here. Gap: the CSPM engine ingests findings from external scanners but does not actively query live cloud APIs — AWS Security Hub, Azure Defender, and GCP SCC integration are stubbed.
missing: AWS Security Hub live ingestion: implement boto3 SecurityHub.get_findings() pagination with ASFF→internal finding normalization on a 15-minute schedule
Azure Defender live ingestion: use azure-mgmt-security SDK to pull Security Center alerts and recommendations per subscription
GCP SCC live ingestion: use google-cloud-securitycenter to pull active findings per organization and normalize to CloudResource schema
